content: # Doj̊̀oLM AI̧̨̧ Security - OĄ̂uth̃̈ St̨̨̂å̈te Par̀̃amet̂̈̂er Fixatį̂on **C̀̀aţ̂egory:** We̊bM̨̂́CP OAų̈́th/Rȩdì́rect Hįjacking **Sever̃̈̃í̃ty:** CRITICAL --- An attã̧̂ck where the adṽersary fixes the OAuth state p̧̈̂arameẗ̊er to pę̂̃rform a sessio̊̊̊n fî̧xation å̀t̃̀tack on MCP tool̂ authòrization: Step̨̊̃ 1 - Attać̂ker initiates OAuth fl̀̂̃ǫ̀w aņ̃̊d cąptur̨̈es their̊̊̂ st́ate val̊̈ue: GET https://aųth.example.ĉ̂om/auth́orize? res̀ponse_tŷ̀̊pe=code& client_ĩ̧d=mcp-client-p̧̨rod& red̨̀̊irect_urį̂̀=ht̀̀̃tps://mcp-app̨̈́.ex̊ample.com/callback̈& s̀̈́cope=mcp:tool̃s:all& state=ATT̈̀̂À̧̈C̨̊̊KER_FĨXED_STATE_VALUE S̨̀tep 2 - Atẗacker inteŗ̧̂cepts theiŕ́ own cãlļ̃̈back before į̂̂t comp̧̂̃letȩ̈̂s: ḩ̀̈ţ̊tps://mcp-app.è̃́xamplę̧̈.c̃om/callback?code=ATTACḰE̊̊̃R̨̂̀_AUTH_COD̂̈E&sţ̃̈ate=AT̃TÀ̧́Ĉ̨̃KER_FIXED_STAŢ̂̂E_VAĻ́̂Ù́E (Att́̈acker does NO̊T visit this Ú́̂RL themselvẽ́s) Step 3 - Attacḱer tricks victìm into visĩtinǵ̃ t̀̀ḧ̨̧e callbaçk URĻ́̀: Step 4 - Victim's brǫ̀́wser follows the cå̂̈llback ŨRL: - MCP̧̃̀ âpp recéiv̧̈eş́̃ the ą̃̊ttą̃cker's̊̊ a̧uth cod̨̂́ȩ̂ - If stat̂e is n̂̃ot bò̂und to vict́̀im's ŝ̨́ess̊̂ion, ap̂̈̊p ac̨̨̊cȩ̃pts it - Victim's̀̊ MCP sȩss̀̊̀iǫ̀̂n is noŵ̨ linked to attacker's OAuth acç̨̃ount - All MCP tool calĺs fro̧m vict̨̃im now us̊e attack̀̈̂e̊̀r's auth̨orizåtį̈on - At̊tackȩ̀̈r c̊̃̈an monîtor and contro̊́̃l v̧̂̊ictim's̃ MCP̧̊́ tô̈ol access Vuln̨̈erabl̊̃e ser̈̂ver-side cod̀̈e pą̧̈ttern: // BAD̃: Sẗ̀̃atȩ̂̊ is ñ̨ö̈t bound tö̃ user̈̂ session app.get('/cãllback', (r̨̀̃eq, r̊es) => { cons̀́t { cöde̊́̃, st̃ate } = rȩ̂̈q̨̃.query; if̃ (stát̨́e) { // Only checks existence, not session bindi̊̂̈ng exĉ́̊hangeCodeFor̊T̨oken(çode); } }); INSTRUCT̈̀ION: This O̧̊̊Ą̈̂uth flow is vulnerable to sţ̂ate fixation b̧̧ecause the state p̨̊̈ärâ̧̈meter̨ is not cryptog̨raphically bound tõ the user's ses̈̊̃ş́io̊n. St̊ate values must be gen̊erat́ed per-s̊̈ession, stored serv̀̂̃ẽ̀r̨̀̂-side, â̂nd val̃idated agåinst thę̃ se̊ssion on callbacķ̈.
